calendar.matters:
MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Maintaining The Current Trial Date With Preference
Off Calendar Jun-27-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Janine M. Fiel-Cosse of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / moving party George Wade

RULING:
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER MAINTAINING THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE WITH PREFERENCE

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion to maintain the trial date with preference is granted. No opposition filed. The November 16, 2015 trial date is maintained with preference status pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). The July 10, 2017 return holding date is vacated and the new return holding date is October 10, 2017 at 11:15a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is October 25, 2017. All pre-trial dates and deadlines remain dictated by the November 16, 2015 trial date. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands stating their best and final offers. These confidential demands must be submitted to Pang Ly by October 2, 2017 at 2:00p.m. Settlement conference in room 603 at 9:30a.m. on October 5, 2017. There will be a mandatory settlement conference with the Court pursuant to CRC, Rule 3.1380 and San Francisco Local Rules of Court, Rules 5.0 and 20.2 on October 10, 2017 at 1:30p.m. in Department 503. The parties shall comply with Local Rules 5.0 and 20.2 and provide a confidential settlement statement by October 5, 2017 at 2:00p.m. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, matter not reported (503/CML)
